title: R-0018: Regime comparator — New Regime is better for salary-only taxpayer
notes: Salary ₹10L. New Regime: taxable = 9.25L → slab = 42,500 + cess (1,700) = ~44,200 (no rebate as income > 12L). Old Regime: taxable = 10L - 50K std - 1.5L 80C = 8L → slab = 72,500, rebate = 0 → cess = 2,900 → ~75,400. New Regime saves ~₹18K. The engine should recommend New Regime. (Exact figures depend on full R-0019/R-0020 chain; this test uses pre-computed end-to-end totals.)
